en: I just need you to give me a refund on my purchase.

en: This is not how you speak with service representatives.

en: Those overdraft fees, they apply.

en: Your account is going to be closed because you're verbally abusive to our agents.

en: This is Veronica, the Escalations Manager.

en: What is pre-customer service? It's a department that filters calls before they reach agents.
